regime_fall.current_status: Iran navigates a precarious diplomatic window as Trump extends the ceasefire indefinitely pending Iranian proposals, while simultaneously maintaining naval blockade and maximum financial pressure; internally, the regime faces 100+ days of widespread violent protests, catastrophic economic hemorrhaging ($500M daily), and IRGC forces at maximum alert with published strike target lists suggesting brinkmanship in negotiating posture.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Trump extended the ceasefire indefinitely on April 21, 2026, conditional on Iran submitting a diplomatic proposal, with Pakistan mediating and creating a critical negotiation window amid continued US blockade and IRGC high-alert positioning.
